name: agenttrust-nemoclaw
description: Wrap OpenClaw browser and API tools with AgentTrust pre-execution policy enforcement, approvals, audit logging, screenshots, and prompt progress tracking.

commands.name: agenttrust:approvals
commands.description: Run the terminal approval presenter for pending AgentTrust step-up requests.

commands.name: agenttrust:monitor
commands.description: Monitor a session's prompts, actions, risk states, and screenshot availability.

commands.name: agenttrust:send
commands.description: Send a user command into an AgentTrust-backed NeMoClaw session.
